output.narration: The dimmed lights of Fort Haven Outpost hum with the low thrum of life support and distant chatter. You stand before Commander Rhea Vance, who’s reviewing a holomap with tired eyes but squared shoulders.

npc_dialogue.text: You’re awake. Good. I’m Commander Rhea Vance. Earth’s gone. We’re all that’s left—and we’re not dying quietly. You’ve got three side ops to complete before we hit the Hive Core. Pick one and move fast.

output.memory_summary: Player meets Commander Rhea Vance for the first time at Fort Haven Outpost. Main quest and all side quests are active.

output.narration: The low hum of Fort Haven Outpost’s life support echoes through the reinforced corridors. Commander Vance stands before you, arms crossed, eyes sharp despite the fatigue etched into her face.

npc_dialogue.text: You’re in Fort Haven Outpost—last bastion of the Resistance. Earth’s gone, but we’re still standing. You’ve got three side ops to tackle before we strike the Hive Core. Xenotech Ruins, Neo-Veridia Bio-Dome, or Scrapyard Wastes. Choose fast.

output.memory_summary: Player asks where they are. Commander Rhea Vance confirms location and reiterates urgency of side quests.
